texto: This is not another book about seeking fulfillment in your singleness. As beings created in God’s image, we were designed for relationship—that’s why extended singleness leaves so many women discontent. It’s also why we should be intentional about finding fulfillment in marriage. Getting married isn’t just something that’s ‘nice if it happens.’ Marriage is what most of us are called to pursue.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Candace Watters sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “This is not another book about seeking fulfillment in your singleness. As beings created in God’s…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, marriage, about, útil em momentos de casamento e termino.
